Hatch

Settings

General

Theme
Choose palette appearance
Keyboard Shortcut
Configured in Chrome settings
Cmd+Shift+K

Snippets

Text snippets with trigger keywords. Use ; prefix in palette to filter. Variables: {{date}}, {{time}}, {{url}}, {{title}}

TriggerNameBody

Aliases

Quick shortcuts. Use %s for parameterized links (e.g., https://jira.com/browse/%s)

KeywordURL

Search Engines

Custom site search. 18 built-in + your custom ones. Use %s for the query placeholder.

KeywordNameURL Template

Notes

Quick notes saved via /note text in palette

NotePageDate

Data

Export All Data
Download snippets, aliases, engines, notes as JSON
Import Data
Restore from a JSON export
Clear Frecency Data
Reset command usage statistics
